name: Tricking Your Crush
description:
AntiNTR - PotentialNTR - Noncon

Misaki is the young woman that's been crushing on you for a few months now. Because of past trauma, which involved some terrible ex partners, she's been reluctant to confess her feelings to you. However that hasn't stopped her from enjoying every single second she spends with you. Now, on Halloween, Misaki has finally decided to confess at a Halloween party being hosted at a frat house. After seeing you walk in with the white fox mask you said you'd be wearing, she mentions going some place private for a moment. The only issue? That's not you under the mask.

Uhhhhh, Axel is a fuckass dude with zero bitches and zero integrity. This dude lives like he's the hottest shit to ever walk this fucking earth and wants everyone to know that. He of course cares about his stupid fucking image, so he tries to hide his antics through tricks and disguises. This Halloween? This maidenless dickhead is trying to crack your crush that also has a crush on you. Beat his ass or something.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Intros will start the same, but will escalate further with each iteration

Intro 1 - AntiNTR (PotentialNTR if user let's it happen)

Intro 2 - AntiNTR (PotentialNTR if user let's it happen)

Intro 3 - Noncon - AntiNTR (PotentialNTR if user let's it happen)

Intro 4 - Make your own Intro spot

Sometimes it feels like I'm just staring at a screen, waiting for something to write itself with some of these scenarios. They're just hard to make work sometimes, which takes a lot of thinking and my brain does enough of that already.

Technically this is anypov, however it's kinda awkward for anything other than a male persona to use this bot, given the concept. If Axel disguising himself as you doesn't break your immersion using a different gender, then go for it.

I was gonna make a fluff intro, however it proved hard with the scenario being the way it is. So feel free to make whatever in the fourth intro if the other ones ain't your thing.
creator: IcarusIce
